text: Got this mini fridge for my bedroom in my Silom condo to keep my skin care cool. The compressor is just a tad loud when it kicks on at night, but it does exactly what it needs to do. 🧴❄️
Absolute disaster. The 'anti-mold' cutting board grew black fuzz after 3 days of standard Bangkok humidity. Going back to solid wood immediately. 🤢
My street rescue dog has terrible separation anxiety, so I bought this lick mat. Put some plain yogurt and peanut butter on it, freeze it, and it buys me 45 minutes of peace. 🐶🥜
Story was a 5/5 but dropping the overall rating to 3 because the shipping completely crushed the slipcase. Book itself is a brilliant masterpiece of SE Asian folklore. 🐉
The 2026 digital nomad visa guide is already outdated lol. Chapter 3 says you need 500k THB in the bank but the new rules just changed. Don't waste your money, just check the official embassy site.
Great little travel adapter. I took it on a hop to Singapore and Japan and it handled all my electronics without getting hot. The USB-C fast charging port is a nice modern touch. 🔌✈️
I am totally addicted to this pebble ice maker. It spits out the exact same 'good ice' you get at cafes. It's loud, but so worth it for my daily Thai iced teas. 🧊🧋
Bought the 'indestructible' chew ring for my Soi dog. He annihilated it in 15 minutes. Swallowed a chunk before I could stop him, thankfully he passed it. Not for aggressive chewers!
Best sci-fi release of the year so far. The political maneuvering in the galactic senate had me internally screaming. I read the last 150 pages while ignoring my boss at work 😂🚀
A very cute, low-stakes cozy fantasy. Features a grumpy wizard and a sunshine baker. Exactly the kind of fluffy escapism I needed after a stressful week. 🧁✨
DOA. Took the drone out of the box, charged the batteries fully, and the remote simply refuses to bind to the unit. The app just crashes on iOS 19. Returning for a full refund.
Very chic fruit hammock that hangs under the cabinets. Saves counter space in my tiny kitchen. Bananas do tend to bruise a bit if you pile too many things on top of them though. 🍌🧺

These tick and flea drops are the real deal. We live near a jungle area in Chiang Mai and my dogs run through the brush constantly. Haven't found a single tick on them since we switched to this brand. 🦟🚫
Boring, pretentious, and completely self-indulgent. The author uses $10 words when a $1 word would do, just to prove how smart they are. I tapped out at page 60.
The index links actually work! I buy a lot of programming ebooks and usually the formatting is pure garbage. This Python 2026 crash course is laid out beautifully. 💻🐍
The ANC on these over-ear headphones completely drowns out the MRT screeching and my loud office neighbors. Battery life lasted a full week of daily commutes. Best $200 I've spent. 🎧🚇
It’s an okay rice cooker. The warm setting scorches the bottom layer of rice if you leave it on for more than an hour. Fine for the price, but I miss my old Zojirushi.
We use this airline-approved carrier for flying Nok Air with our Pomeranian. She fits comfortably and the mesh panels give her good airflow so she doesn't panic. ✈️🐶
A surprisingly poignant YA novel. Handles themes of grief and identity really well without being preachy. I bought a copy for my 15-year-old niece and she devoured it in a weekend.
Format is entirely broken on the Kindle Oasis. Sentences jut off the right side of the screen, and there's no way to adjust the font size to fix it. How do you sell a broken file?! 😡
The smart plug constantly disconnects from my 5GHz wifi. I have to physically unplug it and plug it back in to reset the connection. Annoying when it's located behind a heavy bookshelf.
These oversized beach towels are ridiculously soft and they don't trap sand at all! Took them to Krabi and just shook the sand right off. Perfect for island hopping. 🏖️🌊
Great automatic laser toy, but it eats through AA batteries like crazy. I highly recommend buying rechargeable batteries if your cats are as obsessed with this as mine are. 🐈⚡
This true crime deep-dive is meticulously researched. The author doesn't sensationalize the tragedy, but presents the facts in a way that is utterly gripping. Highly recommend. 🔍📖
A heavily trope-reliant romantasy. Enemies to lovers, 'who did this to you', one bed... it has them all. Fun, but totally predictable. 3.5 stars rounded down.
Solid budget smartwatch for tracking my morning runs in Lumphini Park. GPS is sometimes off by a few meters, but the heart rate monitor seems fairly accurate. ⌚🏃‍♂️
Melted in the dishwasher on the top rack despite claiming to be safe. It warped into an oval and now the airtight lid doesn't fit. Cheap, flimsy plastic scam. 🗑️
My senior cat with arthritis finally found a bed she loves. The memory foam is super thick and supports her joints. She literally snores in it all afternoon. 😻💤
The main character makes the most incredibly stupid decisions just to drive the plot forward. It became so frustrating that I started rooting for the villain.
I am obsessed with this dark academia series. The plot twists in book 3 literally made my jaw drop. Just downloaded book 4 via KU and cancelling all my plans tonight! 🖤📚
Purchased this heavy-duty power bank for the rainy season power outages. It powered my router, charged two phones, and ran a USB fan for 6 hours straight. Absolute beast. 🔋⛈️
The color is nothing like the listing. The 'mustard yellow' is actually a neon, highlighter yellow that completely blinds you when you walk into the living room. Returning immediately. 🟨🙈
The breakaway collar didn't break away! My cat got it caught on a branch in the garden and almost choked. I had to sprint out and cut it off her. Extremely dangerous defect. 🛑🐈
As a history buff, I absolutely loved this. The author paints such a vivid picture of the Ayutthaya period. The inclusion of historical sketches was a lovely touch as well. 🇹🇭🗺️
Really solid meal prep guide for muscle building. The macros are listed accurately for every single recipe. Only docking a star because it lacks visual photos for most dishes. 🥩💪
It's okay. The webcam picture is clear enough for Teams calls, but the built-in microphone picks up a ton of static/background noise. You definitely need a separate mic. 🎥🎤
This mortar and pestle is HEAVY and authentic. Perfect for smashing up garlic and chilies for Som Tum. Just be careful not to drop it on your toes because it will break bones! 🌶️🧄
My rabbits love this foraging mat! Keeps them occupied for ages. I do wish the fabric strips were slightly more durable, as they've chewed through a few of them already. 🐰🥕
Pages 150 to 180 were completely missing from my copy. Checked the binding and it wasn't torn, it was just printed wrong. I needed this for a college class, very mad. 😡
A beautifully raw collection of poetry. I found myself highlighting almost every single page. The themes of diaspora and identity hit really close to home. 🌸🥺
Snagged this ultra-wide curved monitor for my trading setup. It's flawless. Crisp text, great color accuracy, and assembly took less than 5 minutes without any tools. 📈💻
Very pretty ceramic soap dispenser. The pump action is smooth and doesn't squirt soap aggressively at you. Wish it held a bit more volume so I wouldn't have to refill as often. 🧼
Finally found an XL harness that actually fits my Great Dane! The handle on the back is super sturdy for when I need to keep him close in crowded areas. Excellent quality. 🐕🐾
Starts off incredibly strong but the middle 200 pages drag terribly. The author could have cut at least 5 chapters without losing any of the actual story. Good, but desperately needed an editor.
It reads exactly like a ChatGPT generated essay. Weird repetitive transitions, zero emotional depth, and bizarre word choices. Amazon really needs to crack down on AI spam in the Kindle store.
Completely fried my computer motherboard. Plugged the USB hub in, heard a loud POP, and the whole system died. Avoid this cheap knockoff brand unless you want to destroy your tech. 🔥💥
This handheld steamer works better than my expensive iron. Heats up in 20 seconds and gets all the wrinkles out of my linen shirts before work. Absolute game changer. 👔✨
The scratching post looked great out of the box, but the sisal rope started unspooling after just 2 weeks. I've had to hot glue it back together twice now. You get what you pay for.
A staggering work of epic fantasy. The way the magic system relies on celestial mechanics is brilliant. Left me with a massive book hangover. 10/10. 🌌📖
Very practical guide to learning Adobe Premiere in 2026. Cuts out the fluff and gives you exact keyboard shortcuts to memorize. A highly useful digital reference. 🎬💻
The noise cancelling is honestly comparable to AirPods Max but for a fraction of the cost. The clamping force is a bit tight on the jaw if you wear glasses though. 🎧🤓
This mandoline slicer is a death trap. The safety guard doesn't grip the vegetables properly, causing your hand to slip directly toward the blade. Barely avoided a trip to the hospital. 🩸🚫
My chronically anxious shelter cat immediately calmed down when I plugged these pheromone diffusers into the wall. She's actually coming out from under the bed now! 😻😌
The hyped-up 'insane plot twist' was literally just 'it was all a dream/hallucination'. The cheapest, most lazy writing trope in existence. Furious I spent 8 hours reading this.
Spicy, hilarious, and heartwarming! The banter between the two rival chefs had me cackling out loud. This author never misses. Pre-ordered her next book already! 🍳🔥
This GaN charger changed everything. It charges my MacBook, iPad, and iPhone simultaneously at ridiculous speeds without getting hot. Perfect for digital nomads working out of cafes. 💻⚡
These velvet curtains make my bedroom look like a luxury hotel. Completely opaque, heavily weighted, and keeps the afternoon sun from turning my room into a sauna. 🏨🌑
The 'leak-proof' base on this dog toilet is a lie. Urine seeped right through the plastic seam onto my expensive hardwood floors. Absolutely furious. 😡🐕
A fantastic historical deep-dive into the Silk Road. The maps included are highly detailed. Giving 4 stars only because the font size in the paperback edition is offensively small. 🗺️🔍
Cute novella, but it ended abruptly right when the plot was actually getting interesting. Felt more like a prologue than a standalone story. 🤷‍♂️
Router constantly drops the 5Ghz band at random intervals. I've firmware updated, factory reset, the works. If you work from home and need stable internet, do not buy this router.
Sturdy, minimalist bookshelf. The metal frame is quite heavy and supportive. Assembly took a while because some of the pre-drilled holes didn't line up perfectly, but I forced it. 📚🔧
Best litter box for a high-spraying cat! The high walls contain all the mess, and the non-stick plastic actually makes scooping deeply satisfying. 🐈💩
This graphic novel's art style is out of this world. The cyberpunk aesthetics literally pop off the page. The hardcover binding is extremely durable too. 🦾🎨
Literally falsely advertised. Title says it's a complete box set, but it only contains book 1 and 'sneak peeks' of the rest. Pure bait and switch. Requesting a refund immediately.
Snagged this mechanical keyboard for gaming and the red switches are buttery smooth. The RGB syncing software is actually lightweight and doesn't hog my CPU. ⌨️🎮
The nonstick pan was great for exactly 14 days, then eggs started sticking like superglue. I hand washed it and only used silicone spatulas! Awful durability. 🍳❌
My cockatoo definitely enjoys shredding these toys. They keep his beak busy and save my furniture. Deducting one star because the dye stains his beak a weird purple color. 🦜💜
Shipping ruined it. Shipped a softcover book in a large, unpadded poly mailer. It arrived creased entirely in half and permanently bent. Unacceptable. 📦👎
Great summary of stoic principles for modern life. It's a bit repetitive in the middle chapters, but the overarching message is very calming and grounding. 🏛️🧘‍♂️
Decent tablet for just watching YouTube or reading. Don't try to play heavy games on it though, it lags incredibly badly and gets extremely hot in your hands. 📱🔥
I am obsessed with this milk frother. It makes perfect, thick cloud-like foam out of oat milk (which is notoriously hard to froth!). Cleanup takes 3 seconds. ☁️☕
These poop bags are genuinely compostable and yet they don't break when you are picking up... well, you know. Thick, reliable, and eco-friendly! 🌍🐕💩
A masterfully paced thriller until the final 10 pages, which felt incredibly rushed. Still a great read that kept me up past my bedtime, but the ending could have been fleshed out more. 🔪🕰️
I love how the author handles the psychological progression of the main character in this litRPG. Just phenomenal character growth. Book 6 cannot come fast enough! 🗡️📈
The Bluetooth transmitter literally has a 2-second audio delay. Completely useless for watching movies or playing games. Only buy this if you strictly listen to music. 🎧⏳
These silicone food storage bags are great for meal prep and freezing soups. The slide-on clips can be a bit tough to push on initially, but they get easier with time. 🍲🧊
Sizing chart is wildly off. Ordered a 'Large' based on the measurements for my Golden Retriever and it barely fit around his snout. Returning for a refund.
This memoir had me in tears. The author's descriptions of growing up as a first-generation immigrant were so incredibly relatable. Going to buy a physical copy for my mother. 🥺❤️
It's okay. The magic system is confusing and the author info-dumps heavily in the first three chapters. Once you push past that, it's a decent adventure story.
Flawless M.2 NVMe SSD. Popped it right into my PS5, the console formatted it instantly, and now I have 2TB of blazing fast storage. The attached heatsink is perfect. 🎮🔥
The suction cups on this shower caddy are completely useless. Fell off the wall at 3 AM and sounded like a gunshot going off. Scared me to death. Garbage product. 🚿💥
This enzymatic cleaner completely neutralizes puppy pee accidents. Even using a blacklight, the stain is completely gone. Essential for potty training!! 🐶✨
The prose is undeniably beautiful, but literally nothing happens. It's 400 pages of wealthy people complaining about their self-inflicted problems at a summer house. Snore. 🥱
A very practical, no-nonsense guide to freelance writing. The templates for cold pitching editors in the appendix alone are worth the $4.99 price tag. 📝💸
Good 1080p webcam for work-from-home meetings. The auto-focus occasionally hunts for a second if you move too fast, but the color balance is surprisingly warm and natural. 🎥
This wok is a beast. Seasoned it over my gas burner and now it's incredibly non-stick. Perfect for ripping hot stir-fries. My Pad See Ew has never tasted better! 🍜🔥
DO NOT BUY! Gave my ferret severe intestinal blockage. These treats are heavily marketed for ferrets but contain harmful starches. My vet was furious. 🛑🐹
A triumph of historical fiction lore! The author weaves real 18th-century politics into an engaging narrative flawlessly. I couldn't put it down. 📜🏰
Spicy, action-packed, and full of snarky dialogue. The vampire MMC is exactly what I wanted. Don't let the cheesy cover fool you, this is top-tier romantasy! 🧛‍♂️🩸
Ordered this on the 2.2 sale and it arrived via Kerry Express the next day! The ANC is perfect for blocking out the noise on the BTS skytrain. Absolutely love it. 🎧🔥
The non-stick coating on this pan is a total hazard. Pilled and chipped into my Pad Kra Pao after exactly 3 weeks of normal use. Only used silicone spatulas. Requesting a full refund! 😡🍳
Great cooling mat for my husky during the brutal Bangkok summer. Usually he pants all night but now he sleeps soundly. Docking 1 star because it's really heavy to move to clean the floor under it. 🧊🐕
A bit overrated tbh. The BookTok girlies hyped this mystery up, but I guessed the killer by page 80. It's an okay beach read for a trip to Samui, but not life-changing. 📖🏖️
I downloaded this right before a 12-hour flight to Europe and I couldn't put it down. The magic system in this universe is so unique! Already pre-ordered the 2026 sequel. ✨🐉
The battery life is nowhere near the 24 hours advertised. I take it to my coworking space and it dies by 2 PM. Very frustrating when you're in the middle of a Zoom call. 📉
This robot vacuum maps my condo perfectly. It even dodges the cables under my desk without getting stuck! The mopping function actually scrubs the tile too. Lifesaver for busy introverts. 🤖🧹
My cat almost choked on the small plastic eyeball that fell off this plush toy. Quality control is nonexistent. Keep your pets away from this cheap garbage!!! 🛑😿
One of the most beautifully written memoirs of the decade. I was literally sobbing in the back of my Grab taxi. The author's vulnerability is just breathtaking. 😭😭❤️
Horrible formatting. Half the code snippets in this Python guide are cut off on the right side of the screen on my Paperwhite. It's basically useless for actually learning to code. Scam.
Good 4K dashcam for the price. The night vision actually picks up license plates clearly, which is a must for Bangkok traffic! App can be a bit glitchy to download the videos though. 🚗📷
It’s a functional air purifier, but the replacement HEPA filters are weirdly expensive and hard to find in stock. Helps with the PM 2.5 during burning season, but the upkeep costs add up.
My picky Maine Coon usually turns her nose up at wet food, but she DEVOURS this salmon pate. Her coat looks so shiny now. Definitely setting up a monthly subscription! 😻🐟
The premise was cool, but the dialogue reads like 40-year-olds trying to sound like Gen Z. So much cringe slang that makes it unreadable. DNF at 45%.
A highly actionable guide for freelance copywriting in 2026. Cuts out the fluff and goes straight to pitching templates. Only issue is the external links don't always open properly on the Kindle app.
Snagged this portable projector for movie nights on my balcony. The brightness is incredible even with the city light pollution. Built-in speakers actually slap too! 🍿🎬
I left it in the sink to soak and the 'stainless steel' rusted overnight. It stained my white porcelain sink orange. Beyond angry, do not buy this cheap knockoff. 🗑️
Very sturdy airline-approved carrier. Took my pug on a Thai Vietjet flight and it fit perfectly under the seat. Loses a star because the shoulder strap padding is nonexistent and digs in. ✈️🐶
A masterclass in fantasy worldbuilding. This author created three entirely distinct languages and cultures. The map insert at the front is gorgeous. 100% recommend getting the hardcover! ⚔️🗺️
Spicy but zero plot. Like literally just 200 pages of smut with no character development. If that's your vibe, you'll love it, but I needed an actual storyline to stay invested.
Avoid!!! Plugged it in to charge my iPhone 17 and the brick got scorching hot, smelled like burning plastic, and tripped my apartment's breaker. Massive fire hazard. 🔥🤬
These velvet hangers completely transformed my tiny condo closet. Stuff legitimately does not slip off, even my silky blouses. Buying another pack right now! 👗✨
Best odor-control litter on the market, hands down. I live in a 30sqm studio with two cats and you wouldn't even know they have a litter box. Clumps fast and hard! 🐈🏆
The spine was completely unglued when it arrived. Entire chapters of pages are just falling out when you turn them. Amazon needs to stop using terrible bubble mailers for heavy books.
Such a cozy, wholesome progression fantasy! No grimdark violence, just a baker leveling up his magical sourdough starter in a sleepy village. Pure serotonin. 🍞✨🌿
Good mechanical keyboard for the office. The silent red switches don't annoy my desk neighbors. The RGB software is a bloated mess, but the hardware itself is solid. ⌨️
The color is totally misleading. I ordered 'Sage Green' and it arrived looking like fluorescent lime. Completely clashes with my bedroom aesthetic. Will be returning.
Gave my perfectly healthy Golden Retriever severe diarrhea. Vet said this brand has a history of cross-contamination issues. Threw the whole 10kg bag in the trash. 🐕🤢
Fascinating deep dive into the collapse of the 2020s crypto bubble. The timeline helps make sense of all the chaos. A bit dry in the middle chapters, but incredibly informative. 📉💰
Feels like it was written by AI. Repeated phrases, unnatural sentence structures, and chapter 6 randomly talks about a side character that was never introduced. Refunded.
Upgraded to this monitor for my WFH setup. The 144hz refresh rate makes scrolling through massive spreadsheets buttery smooth. Zero dead pixels on arrival! 💻💯
This milk frother kicks out perfect micro-foam for my morning lattes. Literally takes 15 seconds. Way better than spending 150 baht at the cafe downstairs every day. ☕💕
The automatic laser toy is great for tiring out my hyperactive kitten. Wish it had a smart timer option via an app instead of just the manual 15-minute button. 🐱🔴
The pacing of this thriller is relentless! It grabs you by the throat on page 1 and doesn't let go. I read the entire second half standing up in my kitchen because I was so stressed. 🔪😱
Really cute rom-com! The banter was A+ and the fake dating trope was executed perfectly. Dragged a tiny bit during the 3rd act breakup, but still a fun weekend read.
It’s functional, but the smartwatch screen is impossible to read in direct sunlight. Unless you are standing in the shade, you can't even see who is calling you. ☀️⌚
The glass carafe shattered randomly while I was pouring normal hot water into it. I'm lucky I didn't get second-degree burns. DO NOT BUY this brand, it's not tempered glass.
FINALLY a cone of shame my dog can't magically wriggle out of while I'm sleeping. The soft edges mean he doesn't dent my walls when he knocks into them either. 10/10. 🌼🐶
I wanted to love this, but the ending ruined the entire series for me. The author literally used a deus ex machina to revive the main character. Completely cheapened the stakes. Ugh.
A wonderfully thorough and organized cookbook! The hyperlinks in the index actually jump right to the recipes. Made the 15-minute sesame noodles tonight and it was amazing 🍜🤌
This portable SSD is no larger than a credit card but holds 4TB. Blisteringly fast transfer speeds when moving my 4K video footage. Worth every penny for content creators! 📹💾
Sturdy desk, looks much more expensive than it is. The faux wood grain looks pretty realistic. Assembly took roughly 2 hours alone because the instructions are purely pictures, no text.
My dog solved this 'Level 3 Advanced' puzzle toy in under 45 seconds. The sliders are way too loose and just move if the dog knocks the toy with their nose. Waste of money.
An absolute towering achievement in literature. The prose is so elegant I found myself reading sentences twice just to savor them. Bought copies for my siblings immediately. ✨📖
Falsely advertised. It claims to be a full 300-page novel but the story aggressively ends at 40% and the rest of the file is just previews for the author's other books. Scummy.
Solid budget soundbar. Adds genuine depth and bass to my condo's living room setup. Dialogue is clear. Sometimes the Bluetooth takes a solid 30 seconds to connect to my phone though.
It does the job. The blackout fabric is good, but the included curtain rings are cheap plastic that snag on the metal rod when you try to pull them closed. Replaced the rings myself.
The 'large' size wouldn't even buckle around the chest of my medium-sized Beagle. The measurements listed in the description are completely fabricated. Returning today.
Great historical fiction based in Southeast Asia. The author actually did their homework on the cultural nuances. Took away one star because the romance subplot hijacked the main plot at the end.
A fantastic update to the 2025 edition! The new chapters on AI-assisted workflows are super actionable. Highlighted so much of this on my morning commute. 📈🤖
Right earbud just completely died after 3 weeks of gentle use. Unpaired, updated firmware, reset, nothing. Brand is notorious for this issue so do your research unlike me. 😡
Magic in a bottle!! I used this cleaner on my grout lines that haven't looked clean since I moved in. Didn't even have to use a harsh scrub brush. My bathroom looks newly renovated! 🧽✨
My African Grey absolutely goes feral for these pellets. Her feathers are visibly brighter since we made the switch. Subscribe and save makes it totally worth the price point. 🦜💯
Received a copy printed upside down and entirely backwards. How did this even leave the printing press? I'm genuinely baffled by the lack of quality control.
It’s essentially a 20-page pamphlet on time management. A few good quotes, but you can find all this information for free on any productivity blog or TikTok.
Integrates flawlessly with Apple HomeKit. No bridge required, immediate response times. The dimming transition is super smooth compared to cheaper smart bulbs. 💡🌈
Surprisingly soft sheets for synthetic fibers! Washed them 3 times and no pilling yet. They definitely sleep a bit warm, so maybe not the best choice if you sweat at night. 🛏️
Zipper snagged and broke the second time I used it to take my cat to the vet. Had to carry the carrier wrapped in a blanket so he wouldn't escape into Sukhumvit traffic. Cheap materials.
Stephen King proves he's still got it in 2026! Kept the lights on all night after reading this. Character work is top-notch as always and the ending is brutal. 🔪🩸
Good reference material for the AWS cert exam. The search function on the Kindle app makes jumping to specific chapters a breeze. Just passed my test on the first try! 🎉
The cooling fan in this mini-PC is ridiculously loud. Sounds like a hair dryer every time I open more than 3 Chrome tabs. Highly annoying for a silent home office.
This Dutch oven baked my sourdough boule to absolute perfection. The heat retention is exactly the same as the $300 French brands. Why overpay? This thing is a beast. 🍞🍲
Best pet wipes ever! Great for cleaning my bulldog's wrinkles and paw pads after a muddy run at the dog park. Completely unscented so it doesn't irritate his sensitive nose. 🐾
Enjoyed the recipes, but many of the ingredients are very hard to find unless you live right next to a massive international grocery store or specialty Asian market.
Literally a scam. The author copy-pasted public domain articles, ran them through Google Translate, and charged $9.99. Amazon needs to vet these self-published 'guides' better.
Upgraded my WFH setup with this monitor arm, and it freed up so much desk space. Holds my heavy 34-inch ultrawide with zero sagging or wobbly joints. 💪💻
Melted in the dishwasher. Box explicitly states 'Top-rack dishwasher safe'. Now it’s warped into a weird shape and the lid won't fit to create an airtight seal. Cheap junk.
Bought the XL for my Great Dane and IT ACTUALLY FITS!! 🐕 He loves resting his heavy chin on the raised back bolsters. Cover is super easy to unzip and wash.
Great worldbuilding and politically complex plot. The glossary in the back saved my life. Took a star off because a main character's death happened totally off-page, which felt cheap.
Cozy, magical, and totally heartwarming. The perfect palate cleanser after a binge of dark psychological thrillers. The magical coffee shop setting is so charming! 🍂✨☕
Fake capacity USB drive! Marketed as 1TB but when I tested the sectors it corrupted everything past 32GB. Took all my family photos with it. Absolute scam.
Beautiful ceramic bowls, exactly as pictured. They look like they cost $50 each at Pottery Barn. Deducting a star bc one chipped slightly in the dishwasher, so I'm strictly hand-washing now. 🥣✨
It's cute, but the feathers fell off the wand on day two. My cat still plays with the bell part that's left, but kinda disappointed in the durability of the wand attachments.
A triumph of modern sci-fi. World-building on par with Dune and Foundation. The political intrigue had me literally gasping. I need the sequel yesterday. 🌌🚀
Translation is incredibly clunky. Many grammatical errors that pull you right out of the story. Pronouns constantly switch back and forth for the exact same character.
Super fast delivery (arrived same day!). Setup took approx 2 mins. Integrates seamlessly with my Alexa ecosystem. Really vibrant colors for movie syncing. 10/10. 📺🌈
These airtight containers completely reorganized my pantry. I love that they come with the little chalkboard labels. Lids can be stiff at first, but they loosen up perfectly. 🫙
DO NOT BUY THIS. Caused severe chemical burns on my dog's stomach. Vet bill was $300. How is this even legal to sell??!! Amazon needs to pull this immediately. 😡🤬
Boring. The characters are completely 1-dimensional and the dialogue reads like a 14-year-old wrote it on Wattpad. DNF at 30% and moved on.
Very steamy romance 🔥 The chemistry between the leads was off the charts. The plot was a little bit thin, but let's be honest, that's not exactly why I read it lol.
Camera quality is amazing for streaming on Twitch. Auto-focus tracks perfectly even when I lean back. Only con is the included tripod mount is ridiculously short and flimsy. 🎥
The non-slip backing is completely useless on tile floors. I almost slipped and broke my neck stepping out of the shower this morning. Needs a heavy duty rug pad underneath.
My cockatiel goes feral for this toy. Destroys it in about 2 weeks. Wish it was a bit cheaper since it's a consumable item, but it definitely keeps him out of trouble!
This memoir destroyed me in the best way possible. Raw, unapologetic, and beautifully written. Highly recommend the audiobook version too, the author's narration is breathtaking. 🌟
Do not buy. It is simply a collection of poorly translated fairy tales repackaged to look like an original work. Scam artist behavior.
Mouse feels okay, a bit light for my taste. The side macro buttons are awkwardly placed if you have larger hands. It’ll do as a backup travel mouse, but wouldn't game with it.
Transforms my morning routine! Froths almond milk perfectly, which is normally impossible. Cleanup takes exactly 5 seconds under hot water. I've stopped buying $6 lattes entirely. ☕💕
The ONLY flea and tick treatment that actually worked for our feral rescue. Applied once and fleas were falling off dead in hours. No skin irritation either. Lifesaver! 🦟🚫
A solid sci-fi thriller. Did not see the twist on page 300 coming AT ALL. The ending was a tiny bit rushed compared to the slow-burn buildup, but overall a great read.
It’s a decent enough guide for fixing your credit, but mostly just common sense tips and endless links to the author's paid masterclass. Fine for a quick reminder.
Dead out of the box. Plugged it in to 4 different outlets and it just beeps an error code in red. Customer service strung me along for a week and denied a replacement. NEVER again.
Meh. It works fine as a spatula but the handle gets weirdly hot if you leave it resting on the pan lip for even 10 seconds. You need to use a spoon rest.
The zipper broke the very first time I tried to put my cat in the carrier to go to the vet. Almost lost him in the parking lot! Extremely poor manufacturing.
This book completely changed my perspective on life. Highly recommended for anyone going through a major transition like a career change or move. Beautifully articulated. 🌟

Looks exactly like the pictures. The wood finish is nice. Assembly was kinda annoying (instructions were just pictures, no text) but I got it done in an hour. Solid 4 stars.

Meh. It does what it says, but the plastic feels super cheap. I doubt it will last more than six months. You get what you pay for.
Ordered the large size for my German Shepherd but it looks like it was made for a corgi. Sizing chart is totally inaccurate. Returning today.
Boring. I forced myself to get to page 100 before giving up. The dialogue is incredibly clunky and unrealistic. Save your money.
Good info but WAY too short. It's basically an overpriced blog post. Read the whole thing in 20 minutes.
Upgraded from the previous gen and the difference is night and day. Faster processing, camera is insanely sharp, and the battery lasts a full 2 days. Worth every penny 🤑
Color is completely off. The 'sage green' looks more like baby poop yellow in real life. Doesn't match my decor at all.
Lifesaver!!! My cat has chronic kidney issues and this fountain actually gets her to drink water. Quiet motor too. 100% recommend to all cat parents.
Beautiful illustrations. My 5-year-old makes me read this to him every single night. Giving 4 stars only because the binding feels a little loose after a week.
Total scam. The author just copy-pasted Wikipedia articles. Do not support this.

Unreadable on the Kindle app for Android. The tables for the weekly meal plans are completely blank, making the entire premise of the diet book useless. I want my money back immediately. 😡📉

The pacing drags so much. The author spends three full pages describing the protagonist's outfit but completely skips over the training montage. Totally backwards priorities for a fantasy novel. 🙄⚔️

Upgraded my iPad Pro to this 2026 version for digital art. The new screen lamination means there's zero gap between the pencil and the pixels. It feels exactly like drawing on real paper. 🎨🍏

Insanely well-researched biography. The depth of political history is staggering. I'm knocking off one star because the physical book is an absolute brick and the binding crackles when you open it. 🧱📖

Feels like an SEO content mill generated this ebook using ChatGPT. Repetitive phrasing like 'In the ever-evolving landscape of digital marketing...' appears in every single chapter. Boring. 🤖📉
